title: Look a Phone
wikitext:
[]: Look, a Phone             Quote Post by NAveryW » Mon May 18, 2009 3:42 pm Anno designed it himself.

[]:             Quote Post by IrkenEvangelion » Mon May 18, 2009 3:54 pm I'd get it. I don't understand why Asuka has the blue phone and Rei has the red phone in the picture though.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon May 18, 2009 4:04 pm Cute. Very cool Anno designed it. =3

[]:             Quote Post by Timstuff » Mon May 18, 2009 4:15 pm IrkenEvangelion wrote: I'd get it. I don't understand why Asuka has the blue phone and Rei has the red phone in the picture though.

[]:             Quote Post by Dartz » Mon May 18, 2009 4:34 pm You're own personal psychiatrist preloaded onto speed-dial.

[]:             Quote Post by Axell » Mon May 18, 2009 4:34 pm any chance of an unlocked version we could use in the states?

[]:             Quote Post by Timstuff » Mon May 18, 2009 5:35 pm Dartz wrote: You're own personal psychiatrist preloaded onto speed-dial.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Mon May 18, 2009 5:48 pm Judging by Anno's tastes, the default ringtone is probably a train siren.

[]:             Quote Post by The Goose » Mon May 18, 2009 6:10 pm If Anno still doesn't like all the Eva merchandise why would he want to help design one?

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Mon May 18, 2009 6:32 pm Cause like everyone else on the planet, he's human. And I'm sure a wad of cash was thrown his way.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Mon May 18, 2009 6:32 pm The Goose wrote: If Anno still doesn't like all the Eva merchandise why would he want to help design one?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon May 18, 2009 6:51 pm Gendo'sPapa wrote: Cause like everyone else on the planet, he's human.

[]:             Quote Post by cat42 » Mon May 18, 2009 7:19 pm Plus (to play devil's advocate) it could be misleading advertising. article wrote: Director Hideaki Anno and his Studio Khara company supervised and participated in all aspects of the phone's design (including the accessories and packaging), since the phone was specifically designed for use in the new Evangelion films.

[]:             Quote Post by IrkenEvangelion » Mon May 18, 2009 7:23 pm Maybe WE'RE the ones calling Mari.

[]:             Quote Post by schismatics » Mon May 18, 2009 7:58 pm It's all probably a part of Anno's plan to take over the world.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Mon May 18, 2009 9:08 pm IrkenEvangelion wrote: Maybe WE'RE the ones calling Mari.

[]:             Quote Post by Guyver Spawn » Mon May 18, 2009 9:16 pm That pretty cool. I think the blue phone works better with Rei though.

[]:             Quote Post by IrkenEvangelion » Mon May 18, 2009 9:20 pm As I think the red phone compliments Asuka.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Mon May 18, 2009 9:25 pm I'd get it. I don't understand why Asuka has the blue phone and Rei has the red phone in the picture though.

[]:             Quote Post by Guyver Spawn » Mon May 18, 2009 9:33 pm I already use the picture as my wallpaper on my cell phone since I use to take a picture of it with my camera phone.
summary:
[]: Look, a Phone             Quote Post by NAveryW » Mon May 18, 2009 3:42 pm Anno designed it himself.

[]:             Quote Post by IrkenEvangelion » Mon May 18, 2009 3:54 pm I'd get it. I don't understand why Asuka has the blue phone and Rei has the red phone in the picture though.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star
